title: Frequency-Encoded Multicolor Fluorescence Imaging with Single-Photon-Counting Color-Blind Detection.
author: Garbacik ET Sanz-Paz M Borgman KJE Campelo F Garcia-Parajo MF
content: S-EPMC6104530 PMC6104530 Frequency-Encoded Multicolor Fluorescence Imaging with Single-Photon-Counting Color-Blind Detection. Standard fluorescence microscopy relies on filter-based detection of emitted photons after fluorophore excitation at the appropriate wavelength. Although of enormous utility
